image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if we could grow human organs on tiny chips?
Context visual: Organs on chips mimic human organs, allowing scientists to study diseases and test drugs.
Escalation visual: Imagine testing new medicines without risking real patients' lives.
Evidence visual: Research shows these chips can predict human responses better than animal models.
Pattern Interrupt visual: But there’s uncertainty. Not all organs can be replicated accurately yet. Why?
Payoff visual: Advancements in materials and technology could change that, opening doors to personalized medicine.
Cta visual: Curious about more science breakthroughs? Follow for more insights!
